subcodes.first_line: O ye who are associated with the blessed Tree! Give thanks unto God that ye have sprung from this sacred Tree and from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو منتسبین شجره مبارکه حمد کنید خدا را که از این دوحه مقدسه نابت شدید و از
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
